title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to automation reliability and Salesforce deployment handling. OpsPal now automatically recovers from deployment errors and better detects configuration issues that could break your workflows. The platform also expanded its skill library to 683 skills across 25 categories, giving you more automation capabilities for complex RevOps processes.

entries.headline: Automated workflow policies now handle complex business rules
Resolved startup errors that prevented platform launch
New command to promote skills across your automation library
Expanded automation skills library to 683 skills across 25 categories
Enhanced data import reliability and workflow documentation
Salesforce deployments now automatically recover from errors
Standardized display labels across all plugins for consistency
Better Salesforce state and country field detection prevents deployment issues
details: OpsPal now detects when flows reference state/country picklists incorrectly
Deployment validation catches permission issues before they cause failures

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now follow optimized workflow paths
Restored HubSpot automation capabilities that were temporarily broken
